hero.pitch: KeroUm is “the place” to order your meals: a friendly, accessible layout where you find dozens of options along with delivery time, payment method, address and nutrition info, all tailored to your saved or geolocated address. From your phone, your iPad, even your social networks. Pick it and receive it.

demoCta.title: Want to see it working?
demoCta.subtitle: Place an order in the simulation. No charge, no real delivery — just the click-to-table experience.

problem.title: What’s broken today
problem.subtitle: Ordering food online in Brazil is still an obstacle course. You open three sites for one decision, and you still can’t tell what’s happening with your meal.

b1.title: Every restaurant, its own site
b1.body: PDF menu, busy phone line, WhatsApp order. The experience changes every meal.

b2.title: Pay at the door
b2.body: You never know if there’s change, if cards work, if your meal voucher is accepted. Surprise every time.

b3.title: Ordering in the dark
b3.body: Once you order, silence. Did it leave? Is it nearby? Calling the kitchen is your only option.

solution.title: KeroUm fixes it
solution.subtitle: One place to pick, pay for and receive your meals. From your phone, your iPad, or right inside your social networks — transparent from the tap to the door.

b1.title: One catalog, every restaurant
b1.body: Filter by distance, price, ETA and nutrition info. All on a single screen.

b2.title: Pay in the app
b2.body: Card, meal voucher or cash on delivery. Settled before the order leaves the kitchen.

b3.title: Live tracking
b3.body: Order status, chat with the restaurant, and courier location on a map.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps from tap to table.

s1.title: Pick
s1.body: Browse nearby restaurants and filter by taste, price and ETA.

s2.title: Pay
s2.body: Card, meal voucher or cash on delivery — agreed in the app, no surprises.

s3.title: Receive
s3.body: Follow the order live and chat with the restaurant and the courier.

f1.title: Geolocation
f1.body: See what’s open near you, right now.

f2.title: Rich menus
f2.body: Photos, descriptions, ingredients, nutrition info and ratings.

f3.title: Many payment methods
f3.body: Card, meal voucher, cash on delivery — sorted in advance.

f4.title: Web, iPad and mobile
f4.body: Same account everywhere. Start an order on one device, finish it on another.

f5.title: Share and follow
f5.body: Favorite restaurants, lists, and orders you can share with friends.

f6.title: Order status
f6.body: Received, preparing, out for delivery, delivered — live.

faq.title: Frequently asked
faq.subtitle: The questions that fill our inbox.
faq.q1: Which cities will KeroUm launch in?
faq.a1: We’ll start in Fortaleza, Recife and Salvador, then expand gradually through the Northeast and Southeast over the next year.
faq.q2: What does it cost the restaurant?
faq.a2: No monthly fee. KeroUm charges a per-delivered-order commission — aligned with the partner’s real volume.
faq.q3: What about the courier? KeroUm’s or the restaurant’s?
faq.a3: Both models work. Restaurants with their own fleet keep operating. The rest use KeroUm’s partner courier network.
faq.a4: Yes. Sodexo, VR, Ticket and Alelo in the first phase. Others as we integrate.
faq.q5: Can I pay cash on delivery?
faq.a5: You can. The change you need is recorded with the order to keep the doorstep simple.
faq.a6: A small team of developers, business folks and a designer. See the Team section on this page.

contact.title: Let’s talk
contact.subtitle: Want the business plan, a partnership, or to bring KeroUm to your city? Write to us.
